final_answer:
Based on the information from the Wikipedia page, Mercedes Sosa won the Latin Grammy Award for Best Folk Album in 2000 for "Misa Criolla," in 2003 for "Acústico," in 2006 for "Corazón Libre," in 2009 for "Cantora 1," and in 2011 for "Deja La Vida Volar." 

The Wikipedia page also mentions that she won the Latin Grammy Award for Best Folk Album in 2009 for "Cantora 1," which also won Best Recording Package and was nominated for Album of the Year. 

Therefore, between 2000 and 2009, Mercedes Sosa published 5 studio albums.
